body:
## Description

This pull request transforms the Zion Tech Group website into a comprehensive and professional platform. It significantly expands the service offerings by introducing detailed pages for new AI, IT, and Micro SaaS solutions, complete with features, benefits, and competitive market pricing.

Key improvements include:
*   **Expanded Service Portfolio:** Added 20+ new pages detailing a wide range of AI, IT, and Micro SaaS services.
*   **Enhanced User Experience:** Implemented a robust navigation system with a new Header, Footer, and Sidebar, ensuring organized access to all content.
*   **Full Responsiveness:** Optimized the site for all screen sizes and devices, addressing responsiveness issues.
*   **Improved Content Quality:** Provided rich, informative content for all services, including clear pricing and contact details.
*   **Technical Stability:** Resolved existing merge conflicts and ensured a clean, successful build.

The goal is to provide a highly informative, user-friendly, and visually appealing website that effectively advertises Zion Tech Group's diversified solutions and services.

## Type of Change

- [x] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [x] Documentation update
- [x] Performance improvement
- [x] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test updates
- [ ] CI/CD improvements

## Related Issues

Closes #
Related to #

## Testing

- [x] I have tested this change locally
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [x] All existing tests pass
- [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [x] I have tested this change in a browser environment
- [x] I have tested this change on different devices/
